name: Chikatgunde
overview: Four couples, four stories, and the first COVID-19 lockdown in Maharashtra. Be it boredom, an open marriage, finding intimacy in a long-distance relationship, or coming out to your parents, each couple has a unique story to tell in this Anthology.

trailers.title: Chikatgunde [चिकटगुंडे] Season 1 Trailer | Planet Marathi Originals | Akshay Bardapurkar
